title: Socio-ecological indicators of agroecology-systems in the BIOEAST countries
description: A comparative analysis of existing socio-ecological indicator tools for agroecology within the BIOEAST macro-region. It identifies common barriers and drivers for agroecological transition, evaluates the applicability of current tools across farm, food system and policy levels, and proposes supplemental, regionally adapted indicators to support evidence-based agroecological assessment.
